hypotheses.detail: Dates connected to 93 or 39 (day of year, date sum, days remaining, month/day) are bearish. Used for dumps/crashes. Stock market crashed on 3/9. Day 93, day 309, week 39 all caution.
hypotheses.source: Matrix Crypto Numbers Guide + Discord numerology-chat

hypotheses.detail: April 3rd (4/3) is the 93rd day of the year. So 43/34 carries the same destructive energy. Dates adding to 43 or 34 are bearish.
48th prime number = 223. BTC = B(2) T(20) C(3) = 223. 322 = Skull & Bones. These numbers used for false flags, dumps, destruction. Feb 17 = 48th day.
hypotheses.source: Matrix Crypto Numbers Guide + BTC Energy doc

hypotheses.detail: Freemasonry started in 1717. Elite like to sell/take money on #17 dates. The 17th of any month, or dates that reduce to 17. #19 is a hidden 17 (SEVENTEEN=109).
Never a good idea to buy/FOMO right before an #11 date. Usually get a dip on #11 days.
113 has been used for dump signals, but also marks bottoms (buy signal). Dual meaning — dump happens, then it's a buy.
These numbers have been used for pumps. 127 specifically used for downtrend reversals. Watch dates connected to 127/721.
37/73 used for pump signals. The word 'UP' = 37 in gematria. Watch for dates/times connected to 37.

The name 'Bitcoin' = 213 in gematria. BTC has stronger energy on dates matching 213 permutations (123, 132, 213, 231, 312, 321). Bitcoin took off in 2013 (213). Crashed on 3/12 (312). Key dates listed in BTC Energy doc.
When elite decide to pump, it usually happens Monday through Wednesday.
When elite decide to dump, it usually happens Thursday or Friday. NOTE: 2025 update says market makers have switched some of these up.
The TOP of a pump usually happens around Tuesday. 'Top Tuesdays.'
Look for pumps/peaks on the 14th, 15th, and 16th of the month (plus days that add up to those).

hypotheses.rule: Markets peak 5 days before a crash
hypotheses.detail: After BTC gets a big pump, count 5 days forward. If the 5th day lands on a dump number date = confirmation of incoming crash.
Market has bullish energy within 5 days before or after a new moon, getting stronger on the new moon day itself.
Market has bearish energy within 5 days before or after a full moon, getting stronger on the full moon day itself.
6am UTC (1am CST) is often a short term bottom. 12 is at top of clock = tops, 6 = bottoms. Works for both am/pm.
Market often moves in 6-hour periods. Example: 6 hours up, 6 hours down. 1-2 hour delay possible before the shift.
1=7, 2=8, 3=9, 4=10, 5=11, 6=12. When someone posts at 3 o'clock it can mean 9 (opposite). 3/9 = 39 = 93 = destruction. Elite communicate using inverted clock numbers.

hypotheses.rule: Chinese zodiac friend/enemy years apply to assets
hypotheses.detail: BTC founded 2009 = Ox. Enemy = Goat (bearish years). Friends = Snake, Rooster (bullish years). Applies to any asset with a founding date.

hypotheses.rule: The signal always comes before the event
hypotheses.detail: Patterns appear before events, not after. Culture moves first (movies, headlines, social media). Reality 'warms up' — ignition, vibration, motion. Look for theme repetition.
hypotheses.source: Matrixology Substack - 'The Signal Always Comes First'

hypotheses.detail: Language is vibration/frequency/electromagnetic. Words in tweets/posts carry energy that attracts matching outcomes. Hidden negative phonetics in everyday language (weekend=weakened, medicine=medi-sin).
hypotheses.source: Matrixology Substack - 'Language & Ghosts in the Machine'

hypotheses.rule: Gold color in celebrity posts = market peak signal
hypotheses.detail: When gold color/imagery is used in tweets from key figures, the market is likely at or near its peak.
Mercury retrograde periods associated with communication breakdowns, reversals, and market uncertainty.
